message:
test: add dolt-native sync mode tests for RemoteStorage push/pull (bd-v7ydv.4)

Tests bd sync behavior in dolt-native mode using a mock RemoteStorage:
- doExportSync calls Commit+Push, skips JSONL in dolt-native mode
- doPullFirstSync calls Pull, returns early without JSONL merge
- belt-and-suspenders mode does both Push AND JSONL export
- git-portable mode never calls Push
- Error handling: pull errors propagate, "no remote" handled gracefully
- ShouldUseDoltRemote/ShouldExportJSONL mode selection verified via mock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
